title: Rural low-volume lab — extreme low volume stress
description: Rural Indian standalone lab at the low-volume extreme: 12k slides/yr, 1 pathologist FTE, 1 scanner. edge_cases.md flags extreme scale (<20k slides/yr) as needing explicit handling. Expected: fixed-cost pillars (IMS license, storage, opex) may swamp all savings pillars and NPV goes materially negative, OR all pillars scale down proportionally and NPV is small but positive.

comparative.dpa_coverage: partial — DPA assumes enough volume to spread fixed costs
